name: Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor PT Camera
description:
Designed for indoor monitoring, this camera captures clear video with a 3 MP sensor and helps you stay aware of activity through AI human detection and real-time alerts. It can also recognize pet movement and baby crying, making it useful for everyday home observation.

It connects through 2.4GHz WiFi 6 for remote access and supports one-touch calling for quick communication. The PT design, 10X digital zoom, and support for up to a 256GB TF card provide flexible viewing and local video storage for continuous use.

name: Xiaomi Smart Camera 2K Indoor Security Camera
description:
This indoor camera provides 2K image quality with a 360° panoramic viewing range for monitoring spaces through the Mi Home app. It supports clear video capture, low-light colour display, and digital zoom for flexible viewing.

The device includes AI human detection, two-way voice calls, and H.265 video encoding technology. It offers storage options with Micro SD card, NAS, and cloud storage support, along with mounting options and screen rotation features.
